description: Check out my other uploads: https://archive.org/details/@skegox Here are many primary sources from National Socialist Germany, here you will have the opportunity to take a closer look at National Socialists' real ideology.   We have many speeches, books and documents with a lot of precious and rare information. Please save and share! Unfortunately most people around the world are taught lies about this specific subject and the events regarding ww2 and Germany. In schools, universities, media entertainment, no matter where you try to find, all the information is biased, falsified or controlled. Fortunately the internet has freed the knowledge from establishment control. National Socialist  ideology  was kept far away from public eyes because it was and still is the only real threat to the current global establishment and its status quo, with strong criticisms to our limited political alternatives (marxism/liberalism) or (left/right) which are materialistic in nature and lacking proper historical and philosophical grounding. The current world order was stablished after 1945 with destruction of the last bastion of resistence against globalism imposed by international big finance and its jewish banking tycoons. After the biggest crime against humanity ever perpetraded by those few man and its paid politicians the smearing campaign against Germany started, in order to regard National Socialism morally unacceptable and reedeming it as an "evil" ideology in the post war. The  frankfurt school of thought, marxism and the holocaust narrative are the great ideological tools used by this establishment in the post war jewish world order.  National Socialism, an ideology which promotes love, peace and friendship for all peoples and races.  Despite the censorship in the academic fields as well in the mainstream media you can now hear what NS Germany really said, lived and died for. If you are interested in the historiography regarding the true events of world war two, National Socialist Germany and about what is known as the holocaust, study Revisionism or Historical review, the only true critical aproach to XX century History.                   We will only have justice and freedom when the truth comes to light NO to the censorship! Here is the Historical Review Archive:  https://archive.org/details/WorldWarTwoHistoricalReview_201710 Some websites where you can find more sources and information: http://www.vho.org/ http://inconvenienthistory.com/ http://nseuropa.blogspot.com/ http://nseuropa.org/ https://www.islam-radio.net/ https://third-reich-books.com/ http://galleria.thule-italia.com/ http://codoh.com/ https://armreg.co.uk/ http://holocausthandbooks.com/ https://www.wintersonnenwende.com/scriptorium/english/welcome.html http://barnesreview.org/ http://www.jewwatch.com/ http://library.flawlesslogic.com/
